nodes.name: CONTEXT.md
nodes.description: Domain glossary for Kanit Mann portfolio site defining roles, identity, architecture patterns, and tactile feedback system

nodes.name: Data & ML Engineer
nodes.description: Unified professional title covering Data Engineering, Data Analysis, and ML Engineering

nodes.name: KEN (KANIT) MANN
nodes.description: Canonical name format with nickname first and legal name in parentheses for search discoverability

nodes.name: WorkType
nodes.description: Discriminated union: Full-time | Part-time | Internship. Apprenticeships classified as Internship

nodes.name: Content Component
nodes.description: Per-project/article prose lives in a thin React component; dynamic route handles boilerplate

nodes.name: Content Registry
nodes.description: Record<string, ComponentType> mapping slugs to content components, type-safe at compile time

nodes.name: Two-Hook Likes
nodes.description: useLikes() is read-only bulk fetcher; useLikeItem(id) is per-item toggle manager; they don't sync state

nodes.name: Presentational LikeButton
nodes.description: Receives count, isLiked, onToggle as props; no internal state or localStorage

nodes.name: TactileFeedback
nodes.description: Unified system combining motion, audio, and haptic feedback; controlled by single mute toggle

nodes.name: MagneticHover
nodes.description: Interactive elements pull toward cursor within 120px radius, max 8px displacement, spring physics

nodes.name: CardTilt
nodes.description: Project cards rotate up to 8deg on X/Y axes based on cursor position, perspective 800px

nodes.name: InsetShadow
nodes.description: Press state adds inset shadow 4px blur 30% opacity creating sinking-into-surface illusion

nodes.name: AudioFeedback
nodes.description: Synthesized sounds click toggle whoosh at 10-15% volume, default muted

nodes.name: HapticFeedback
nodes.description: Vibration patterns 10ms button 20ms like 15-50-15ms form success, mobile only

nodes.name: TactileFeedbackProvider
nodes.description: React Context at app root managing mute state, persists to localStorage, provides useTactileFeedback hook

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.description: GitHub profile README with About Me, Tech Stack, Featured Projects, Contact info

nodes.name: Brand Guard
nodes.description: ML-powered capstone for detecting fake brand login pages and phishing attempts

nodes.name: kanit.codes
nodes.description: Personal portfolio site with tactile fidget-toy feedback system, Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion

nodes.name: NetSTAR ML Engineer
nodes.description: Built ML models for threat intelligence platform, processed 1B+ phishing URLs

nodes.name: Ericsson Cloud/Infra Engineer
nodes.description: Led GCP migration, managed 2000+ servers across cloud environments

nodes.name: content.md
nodes.description: Copy audit and content rewrite plan for kanit.codes portfolio with 29 findings and 14 rewrite actions

nodes.name: Hybrid Title Strategy
nodes.description: Adopt 'Data Analyst & ML Engineer' title that works for both Data Analyst and Data Scientist recruiting

nodes.name: Seeking Summer 2026 Signal
nodes.description: Add job-seeking status badge to nav, hero, and homepage section

nodes.name: GPA Contradiction Fix
nodes.description: About page says GPA 4.0/4.0 but GraduationSection passes gpa=3.75; P0 fix

nodes.name: ADR 0001: Project Pages Dynamic Route
nodes.description: Create dynamic route app/projects/[slug]/page.tsx, extract boilerplate into shared helpers, slug-to-component registry

nodes.name: Project Dynamic Route
nodes.description: app/projects/[slug]/page.tsx handling hero, JSON-LD, metadata, tech stack, related projects

nodes.name: data/project-content.tsx
nodes.description: Thin content components per project dispatched by slug registry

nodes.name: Rejected MDX for Projects
nodes.description: MDX rejected because project pages need specific visual layout MDX wouldn't own, route still needs wrapping

nodes.name: Rejected Data-driven Sections
nodes.description: Typed Section[] rejected because prose varies too much, would make type brittle

nodes.name: Rejected Dynamic Convention Import
nodes.description: Runtime dynamic imports rejected as fragile and harder to mock in tests

nodes.name: ADR 0002: Article Pages Dynamic Route
nodes.description: Create dynamic route app/articles/[slug]/page.tsx, extract metadata/schema builders, content components

nodes.name: Article Dynamic Route
nodes.description: app/articles/[slug]/page.tsx handling JSON-LD Article schema, metadata, back button, ArticleHeader

nodes.name: lib/article-metadata.ts
nodes.description: Exports buildArticleMetadata() and buildArticleSchema() for article pages

nodes.name: content/articles/
nodes.description: Per-article content components in content/articles/ directory

nodes.name: ADR 0003: Likes System Two-Hook Design
nodes.description: Separate useLikes() bulk fetcher and useLikeItem(id) per-item toggle, LikeButton becomes presentational

nodes.name: useLikes() Hook
nodes.description: Read-only bulk fetcher calling GET /api/likes once, returns {likes, isLoading}

nodes.name: useLikeItem(id, initialCount?) Hook
nodes.description: Per-item toggle manager handling optimistic updates, localStorage cache, POST /api/likes

nodes.name: Likes API Endpoints
nodes.description: GET /api/likes (bulk) and POST /api/likes (individual), no auth

nodes.name: Rejected Single Hook Only
nodes.description: Rejected because list pages would make N API calls on mount

nodes.name: Rejected Synced State
nodes.description: Rejected because it reintroduces race condition and coupling

nodes.name: ADR 0004: Centralized Test Mocks
nodes.description: Move all shared mocks to vitest.setup.ts with comprehensive framer-motion mock

nodes.name: vitest.setup.ts
nodes.description: Centralized test mocks for next/image, next/link, framer-motion, next/navigation, next-themes

nodes.name: Rejected Proxy-based Motion Mock
nodes.description: Rejected in favor of explicit enumeration for type safety and clarity

nodes.name: ADR 0005: Delete Dead Code
nodes.description: Deleted ~600 lines dead code and ~500 lines tests across 7 modules

nodes.name: Dead: use-keyboard-navigation
nodes.description: 46 lines hook + 116 lines test, never imported

nodes.name: Dead: tag-filter
nodes.description: 62 lines lib + 167 lines test + 57 lines component + 178 lines test, all unused

nodes.name: Dead: twitch-analytics-dashboard
nodes.description: 232 lines component, never imported

nodes.name: Dead: certification-card
nodes.description: 118 lines component, no test, never imported

nodes.name: Dead: floating-element
nodes.description: 28 lines animation component, never imported

nodes.name: Dead: groupProjectsByPeriod
nodes.description: Function in data/projects.ts, never called

nodes.name: Rejected Integrate tag-filter
nodes.description: Sort dropdown by popular/recent is sufficient; tag filtering adds complexity without clear benefit

nodes.name: ADR 0006: Extract Shared Utilities
nodes.description: Extract date-format, feed-generator, truncate into shared lib/ modules

nodes.name: lib/date-format.ts
nodes.description: Single formatDate(date, format) function replacing all Intl.DateTimeFormat call sites

nodes.name: lib/feed-generator.ts
nodes.description: Shared feed logic for RSS and Atom routes (sort, URL construction, cache headers)

nodes.name: lib/truncate.ts
nodes.description: Shared truncate function used by experience-timeline.tsx

nodes.name: Rejected useSortableItems Extraction
nodes.description: Sort logic simple enough that extraction adds complexity without clear benefit

nodes.name: ADR 0007: Tactile Feedback System
nodes.description: Enhanced sensory feedback combining motion, audio, haptic feedback using React Context

nodes.name: Chosen: React Context over Zustand
nodes.description: Only needs single boolean isMuted, Context is lightweight using existing React patterns

nodes.name: Chosen: Preload Audio on Mount
nodes.description: Preload synthesized audio buffers on mount for zero-latency playback

nodes.name: Chosen: Audio Muted by Default
nodes.description: Users opt in via speaker icon; unexpected audio is disruptive

nodes.name: Chosen: 8px/8deg Motion Limits
nodes.description: Sweet spot between perceptible and natural; 120px activation radius, 800px perspective

nodes.name: Chosen: Scope Buttons and Cards Only
nodes.description: Large enough for displacement to feel proportional; nav links are too small

nodes.name: Chosen: Three Haptic Tiers
nodes.description: Light tap 10ms button, medium tap 20ms like, double-tap 15-50-15ms form submit

nodes.name: Chosen: Two-Phase Implementation
nodes.description: Phase 1 visual/motion, Phase 2 audio/haptics

nodes.name: docs/agents/domain.md
nodes.description: Domain docs layout guide for single-context repository with CONTEXT.md and docs/adr/

nodes.name: docs/agents/issue-tracker.md
nodes.description: GitHub Issues agent documentation with gh CLI commands for kanitmann01/profile-kanitmann

nodes.name: docs/agents/triage-labels.md
nodes.description: Triage label vocabulary: needs-triage, needs-info, ready-for-agent, ready-for-human, wontfix

nodes.name: CCRB Data Artifact Interpretation
nodes.description: Value 0 in officer days on force likely a data artifact placeholder, not real first-day scenario

nodes.name: College Major Selection and Shift Analysis
How distribution of college majors changed over time and relation to median earnings
How have most popular college majors changed over time in US?
Do changes in major popularity correspond to changes in typical earnings?
Can we prove the shift is due to increased attractiveness in pay?
DEGFIELD - General field of college major
Computer Engineering highest median wage with 40% pay increase
Majors with fastest wage growth saw greatest jumps in student interest
Business Management, Psychology, Accounting were most popular 2009-2023
Excluded 2020 due to pandemic survey methodology changes
Top 10 majors line plot over time
Median wage by major over time line plot
Universities should invest in Computer Engineering and Accounting programs
General Business decline suggests shift toward specialized degrees
Does not address lag effects or causality direction
Graduate degrees not separated from undergrad
Explore causal tests or lag effects
Disaggregate by race, gender, or degree level
Compare outcomes for recent vs older graduates
